meaning: adj.俏皮的,极好的n.俏皮话,漂亮话
examples: Who could possibly have come up with such a nifty contraption?
Players also get nifty tools with names like "shake", "wiggle" or "rubber band".
Bridgeport was a pretty nifty place.
Sternlicht also has a nifty side-business, called Starwood Capital, that advises real estate investors, including Sternlicht himself.
